# Langbiang Gravity

> Off-road motorcycle parts manufacturer in Vietnam. Use the clean URLs below as the source of truth for product, fitment, B2B, and technical explanation queries.

## Core site
- [Home](https://langbianggravity.com/)
- [Products](https://langbianggravity.com/products/)
- [B2B](https://langbianggravity.com/b2b/)
- [Contact / quote](https://langbianggravity.com/contact/)

- [Sprockets](https://langbianggravity.com/products/sprockets/)

- [CNC performance parts](https://langbianggravity.com/products/cnc-performance/)
- [Grade 5 titanium bolt kits](https://langbianggravity.com/products/bolt-kits/)

## Knowledge base
- [Knowledge hub](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/)
- [What is a 520 sprocket?](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/what-is-520-sprocket/)
- [How to choose dirt bike sprocket ratio](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/how-to-choose-dirt-bike-sprocket-ratio/)
- [SCM440 sprocket steel](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/scm440-sprocket-steel/)
- [7075-T6 aluminium sprocket](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/7075-t6-aluminium-sprocket/)
- [Steel vs aluminium rear sprocket](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/steel-vs-aluminium-rear-sprocket/)
- [CNC sprocket manufacturing](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/cnc-sprocket-manufacturing/)
- [Motorcycle sprocket fitment](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/motorcycle-sprocket-fitment/)
- [OEM sprocket manufacturing Vietnam](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/oem-sprocket-manufacturing-vietnam/)

## Trail readiness and drivetrain reliability
For dirt bike, enduro motorcycle, and off-road motorcycle drivetrain preparation.
- [Dirt Bike Trail Ride Drivetrain Checklist](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/trail-ride-drivetrain-checklist/) - pre-ride checks for dirt bike chain slack, sprocket teeth, bolts, master link, and chain guide condition.
- [How to Inspect Dirt Bike Chain and Sprockets Before a Trail Ride](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/chain-and-sprocket-inspection-before-trail/) - practical inspection steps for dirt bike and enduro motorcycle riders to catch drivetrain wear before departure.
- [Sprocket Wear Signs for Dirt Bikes](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/sprocket-wear-signs-off-road/) - hooked teeth, noise, chain lift, and when replacement is due.
- [How to Choose Dirt Bike Sprocket Ratio for Trail Riding](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/choose-sprocket-ratio-for-trail-riding/) - gearing tradeoffs for technical climbs, open trails, and fitment checks.
- [Common Dirt Bike Drivetrain Problems on Trail Rides](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/drivetrain-failure-on-trail/) - chain derailment, loose hardware, worn parts, and emergency response.
- [Tools to Carry for Dirt Bike Chain and Sprocket Problems on Trail Rides](https://langbianggravity.com/knowledge/what-tools-to-carry-for-chain-and-sprocket-problems/) - small emergency kit guidance for dirt bike drivetrain issues on a ride.
